core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: B2B SaaS structure combined with high-end hospitality elegance.
Emotion First: The landing page must evoke 'relief from chaos'—shifting from messy restaurant management to a crisp, controlled command center.
Contrast: Stark white base with near-black typography and one vibrant, appetizing accent (Tomato/Orange-Red).
Negative Space: Massive padding for a premium, uncrowded feel.
The Anti-Default: Avoid generic SaaS illustrations. Use real photos of modern POS or restaurant interiors, layered with sharp geometric UI components.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for bento grid cards. Use py-24 to py-32 for section spacing.

grid_strategy.features: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall (col-span-4 row-span-2), wide (col-span-8), and square blocks.
grid_strategy.how_it_works: Vertical timeline or staggered alternating grid with connecting lines.
grid_strategy.dashboard_preview: MODE B: 'Control Room' grid for the UI mockups within the features.

spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-gray-200. No soft drop shadows for cards—use sharp 1px borders to ground them (Grid Borders variant).

buttons.primary: bg-[#E0402A] text-white hover:bg-[#C93622] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.bento_item: bg-white border border-gray-200 p-8 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden relative group hover:border-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors duration-300

forms.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded-none, border-gray-300 focus:border-[#E0402A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E0402A]

components.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header (z-50) over content. Includes Logo (QR Restoran), feature links, and 'Pulsuz Qeydiyyat' CTA.
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with Duotone weight for a premium, layered tech look.

pages_and_sections.name: Header
pages_and_sections.content: Logo (QR Restoran), Links: Xüsusiyyətlər, Necə İşləyir, FAQ. Button: Pulsuz Qeydiyyat. Style: Crystal Glass over content.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.content: H1: 'Restoranınızı Rəqəmsallaşdırın. Xaosu İdarə Edin.' (Digitize your restaurant. Manage the chaos.) Subheadline explaining the all-in-one POS, QR Menu, and KDS system. CTA: 'İndi Başlayın' (Start Now). Split layout with high-quality restaurant interior image on the right or background.

pages_and_sections.name: Features Bento Grid
pages_and_sections.content: Highlight: QR Menu, Kitchen Display (KDS), Multi-Kitchen Routing, Live WebSocket Orders, Inventory Management, Staff Management. Use the Tetris grid. E.g., large card for KDS, tall card for QR Menu preview.

pages_and_sections.name: How It Works
pages_and_sections.content: 3-step process. 1. Qeydiyyatdan Keçin (Register). 2. Menyunu Yaradın (Create Menu). 3. Sifarişləri Qəbul Edin (Receive Orders). Use large typography numbers.

pages_and_sections.name: FAQ
pages_and_sections.content: Accordion section (Shadcn Accordion) with questions about setup time, pricing, hardware support.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.content: Massive typography for 'QR Restoran' at the bottom. Links, contact info, dark section (bg-black text-white) to contrast the rest of the light page.

pages_and_sections.name: Registration Modal/Flow
pages_and_sections.content: Clean, minimal Shadcn dialog or split-page for new restaurant owners. Fields: Restaurant Name, Owner Name, Phone, Email, Password. Submit CTA.

hero_image.description: Lush modern indoor restaurant dining, used for hero background or split layout. Ensure max bg-black/40 overlay if text is on top.

feature_pos.description: Close up of screen displaying food/POS interface. Use in the KDS / Management feature bento card.

feature_qr.description: QR code on a restaurant table. Use in the QR Menu feature card.

general_dining.description: Modern cafe/restaurant interior. Use in 'How it Works' or Registration sections.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The content on the page MUST be written in Azerbaijani, as requested by the user.
DO NOT use Inter for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or fallback to a bold geometric sans if unavailable.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards with soft drop shadows. Use the bento grid classes described: flat backgrounds, sharp 1px borders, generous p-8 padding.
Ensure all buttons have hover state color shifts.
Implement the registration flow as a Shadcn Dialog (Modal) triggered by the 'Pulsuz Qeydiyyat' buttons.
Use 'framer-motion' for subtle scroll entrance animations on the bento cards.
NEVER use placeholder domains (via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
